stemHtml: Which one of the following is an advantage of a Microwave Landing System (MLS) compared with an Instrument Landing System (ILS)?

options.a: It is insensitive to geographical site and can be installed at sites where it is not possible to use an ILS
options.b: It does not require a separate azimuth (localiser) and elevation (azimuth) transmitter
options.c: The installation does not require to have a separate method (marker beacons or DME) to determine range
options.d: There is no restriction on the number of ground installations that can be operated because there is an unlimited number of frequency channels available
